description: Add inline WYSIWYG text editing to the deck builder slide preview. Double-click text elements to edit in-place with contentEditable, floating bold/italic/underline toolbar, and PostMessage communication with the parent editor.

userStories.title: contentEditable inline editing script
userStories.description: As an admin using the deck builder, I want to double-click text elements in the slide preview to edit them in-place.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/inline-edit-script.ts exporting getInlineEditScript(): string
Returns a <script> block (IIFE pattern) injected into slide preview iframes
On dblclick of text elements (h1,h2,h3,h4,p,span,li,td,th,blockquote,label): set contentEditable='true', focus
Text detection: element has direct text node children OR is a heading/paragraph/list-item tag
Ignore: div with only child elements, img, video, svg, canvas
Highlight: outline 2px solid #92B090, outline-offset 2px, border-radius 2px
One element editable at a time
On blur or Escape: remove contentEditable, remove highlight, PostMessage to parent
PostMessage: { type: 'inlineEdit', tag, innerHTML, originalInnerHTML, selector }
selector: best-effort CSS path (tag + class + id or nth-child)
Responds to enableInlineEdit/disableInlineEdit PostMessage from parent
Coexists with SELECTOR_SCRIPT (both listen on window message with different type keys)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read DeckEditorClient.tsx SELECTOR_SCRIPT pattern for how iframe scripts work. The inline edit script uses separate message types (enableInlineEdit/disableInlineEdit) to coexist with the selector script (enableSelector/disableSelector).

userStories.title: Floating formatting toolbar
userStories.description: As an admin editing text inline, I want a floating toolbar with bold/italic/underline buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Toolbar created inside the same inline edit script when contentEditable activates
3 buttons: B (bold), I (italic), U (underline)
Uses document.execCommand('bold'/'italic'/'underline') on click
Style: bg #121210, border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08), border-radius 4px, shadow
Buttons: monospace 13px, padding 4px 8px, color #fff
Active state: bg #92B090, color #0a0908 — checked via queryCommandState on selectionchange
mousedown.preventDefault on buttons to prevent blur of editable element
Positioned above editable element (or below if near top of viewport)
Removed on commit (blur/Escape)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented together with US-001 in the same getInlineEditScript() function. The toolbar is created as a fixed-position div appended to document.body inside the iframe.

userStories.title: Inject inline edit script into slide preview iframes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the inline edit script injected into the CenterSlidePreview iframes and wired up with PostMessage communication.
acceptanceCriteria: Import getInlineEditScript in DeckEditorClient.tsx
Create INLINE_EDIT_SCRIPT constant from getInlineEditScript()
Append INLINE_EDIT_SCRIPT to srcdoc for CenterSlidePreview (both custom HTML and layout slides)
Do NOT append to SlideThumbnail iframes
Send enableInlineEdit/disableInlineEdit alongside existing selector mode messages
Change CenterSlidePreview iframe from pointer-events:none to pointer-events:auto always (so double-click works)
Add PostMessage listener for 'inlineEdit' type in DeckEditorClient useEffect
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read DeckEditorClient.tsx for SELECTOR_SCRIPT injection pattern, CenterSlidePreview component, SlideThumbnail component, and the PostMessage useEffect. The inline edit script should be appended alongside SELECTOR_SCRIPT in the same srcdoc.
